SEARCH
Package compiler.simulation

Class World

java.lang.Object
compiler.simulation.World
public class World extends Object
Thread-safe hex world snapshot.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    World(int width, int height)
    Creates a world with the given rectangular bounds.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addFood(int x, int y, int amount)
    Adds food to a valid non-rock, non-critter hex.
    int
    distance(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2)
    Computes hex distance between two coordinates.
    Critter
    getCritterAt(int x, int y)
    Returns the critter at the given coordinate, if any.
    int
    getHeight()
    Returns world height.
    HexState
    getHex(int x, int y)
    Returns state at the given coordinate.
    int
    getWidth()
    Returns world width.
    boolean
    isInBounds(int x, int y)
    Checks whether a coordinate lies inside rectangular world bounds.
    boolean
    isValidCoordinate(int x, int y)
    Checks whether a coordinate is in bounds and valid for doubled-hex parity.
    void
    killCritter(Critter critter, int foodAmount)
    Removes a critter and replaces its cell with food.
    boolean
    moveCritter(Critter critter, HexDirection direction)
    Attempts to move a critter one step in the given direction.
    HexCoordinate
    neighbor(int x, int y, HexDirection direction)
    Returns neighboring coordinate in the given direction.
    void
    placeCritter(Critter critter, int x, int y)
    Places a critter on an empty valid hex.
    void
    placeFood(int x, int y, int amount)
    Places food on an empty valid hex.
    void
    placeRock(int x, int y)
    Places a rock on an empty valid hex.
    int
    takeFood(int x, int y, int amount)
    Removes and returns up to amount food from a hex.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • World

      public World(int width, int height)
      Creates a world with the given rectangular bounds.
      Parameters:
      width - world width in cells
      height - world height in cells

  • Method Details

    • getWidth

      public int getWidth()
      Returns world width.
      Returns:
      number of columns

    • getHeight

      public int getHeight()
      Returns world height.
      Returns:
      number of rows

    • isInBounds

      public boolean isInBounds(int x, int y)
      Checks whether a coordinate lies inside rectangular world bounds.
      Parameters:
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      Returns:
      true when inside bounds

    • isValidCoordinate

      public boolean isValidCoordinate(int x, int y)
      Checks whether a coordinate is in bounds and valid for doubled-hex parity.
      Parameters:
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      Returns:
      true when coordinate is usable as a hex cell

    • getHex

      public HexState getHex(int x, int y)
      Returns state at the given coordinate.
      Parameters:
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      Returns:
      cell state, or rock for out-of-bounds locations

    • neighbor

      public HexCoordinate neighbor(int x, int y, HexDirection direction)
      Returns neighboring coordinate in the given direction.
      Parameters:
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      direction - movement direction
      Returns:
      neighbor coordinate

    • distance

      public int distance(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2)
      Computes hex distance between two coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x1 - first x coordinate
      y1 - first y coordinate
      x2 - second x coordinate
      y2 - second y coordinate
      Returns:
      non-negative distance

    • placeCritter

      public void placeCritter(Critter critter, int x, int y)
      Places a critter on an empty valid hex.
      Parameters:
      critter - critter to place
      x - target x coordinate
      y - target y coordinate

    • moveCritter

      public boolean moveCritter(Critter critter, HexDirection direction)
      Attempts to move a critter one step in the given direction.
      Parameters:
      critter - critter to move
      direction - movement direction
      Returns:
      true if movement succeeded

    • placeFood

      public void placeFood(int x, int y, int amount)
      Places food on an empty valid hex.
      Parameters:
      x - target x coordinate
      y - target y coordinate
      amount - food amount to place

    • addFood

      public boolean addFood(int x, int y, int amount)
      Adds food to a valid non-rock, non-critter hex.
      Parameters:
      x - target x coordinate
      y - target y coordinate
      amount - food amount to add
      Returns:
      true when food was added

    • takeFood

      public int takeFood(int x, int y, int amount)
      Removes and returns up to amount food from a hex.
      Parameters:
      x - source x coordinate
      y - source y coordinate
      amount - requested food amount
      Returns:
      actual food removed

    • getCritterAt

      public Critter getCritterAt(int x, int y)
      Returns the critter at the given coordinate, if any.
      Parameters:
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      Returns:
      critter at location, or null

    • killCritter

      public void killCritter(Critter critter, int foodAmount)
      Removes a critter and replaces its cell with food.
      Parameters:
      critter - critter to remove
      foodAmount - food value left behind

    • placeRock

      public void placeRock(int x, int y)
      Places a rock on an empty valid hex.
      Parameters:
      x - target x coordinate
      y - target y coordinate
